metaDescription.en: Terms and conditions for using PeeKeeper website and services.

content.en:
By accessing and using the PeeKeeper website, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and conditions. Please read these terms carefully before using our website.

All products and services are provided on an 'as is' basis without any warranties. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue any product without prior notice.

Prices are subject to change without notice. We are not responsible for typographical errors regarding price or product descriptions.

Your use of any information or materials on this website is entirely at your own risk. It is your responsibility to ensure that any products, services, or information available through this website meet your specific requirements.
